description:
Produce a congestion analysis report for the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) by running a headless 'sumo' simulation that collects edge-level mean traffic data at 300-second aggregation intervals. Save the raw simulation output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edge_meandata.xml. The final output must be a ranked text report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/congestion_report.txt listing the top 5 most congested edges by time-averaged occupancy percentage (0-100). The report must use exactly this format:

1. <edge_id> occupancy=<value>
2. <edge_id> occupancy=<value>
3
